html:
Professional Camera Systems

4K UHD Surveillance

Our Uniview UNV camera systems provide comprehensive video surveillance for your property. Professional-grade cameras capture 4K UHD crystal-clear footage, giving you complete visibility and peace of mind.

With remote viewing capabilities, smart AI detection alerts, and advanced recording features, you can monitor your property from anywhere in the world using your smartphone, tablet, or computer. Professional installation ensures optimal camera placement and system configuration for maximum coverage and performance.

Uniview UNV Technology

Our camera systems feature cutting-edge Uniview UNV technology designed for reliability and performance.

4K Ultra HD

Uniview UNV cameras deliver exceptional 8MP 4K image quality with AI-enhanced imaging and HDR processing. Advanced color night vision technology ensures clear, detailed video footage even in low-light conditions.

AI Smart Detection

Advanced AI technology distinguishes between humans, vehicles, and false alarms to eliminate unnecessary notifications. Receive smart notifications only when it matters, reducing false alerts and ensuring you're alerted to genuine security events.

Remote Access

Access your camera system from anywhere using UNV-Link User mobile app or Easy Station 3.0 desktop application. View live feeds, review recorded footage, and receive instant smart AI detection alerts on your devices.

System Infrastructure

Professional-grade recording and networking equipment for reliable, scalable surveillance.

Network Video Recorder

Professional NVR systems provide reliable storage and advanced management of your recorded footage. Scalable storage capacity ensures you can record as much footage as needed for extended periods.

Network Connectivity

IP-based cameras connect seamlessly to your network infrastructure. Wire cameras anywhere on your network, even in remote buildings or across large properties, ensuring comprehensive coverage through reliable hardwired connections.

NDAA Compliance

Our camera systems meet NDAA (National Defense Authorization Act) compliance standards, ensuring security and reliability for government and enterprise applications. Trusted technology that meets the highest security requirements.

Why Choose a Professional Camera System

Professional installation and quality equipment make all the difference in video surveillance.

Complete Visibility

Keep watch over your property, family, and assets from anywhere. Professional camera placement ensures comprehensive coverage of all critical areas.

The Deterrent Effect

Visible security cameras act as a powerful deterrent to potential intruders and provide valuable evidence in the event of incidents.

Professional Support

Receive ongoing professional support, troubleshooting, and maintenance services to keep your camera system operating at peak performance.

Equipment Ownership

You own all equipment and data from day one. Complete data sovereignty means your video footage stays on your property under your control. No rental fees, subscription fees, or long-term contracts required.

Ready to enhance your security with professional cameras?

Contact us for a free consultation and custom camera system quote.
